python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-20':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

Title: Which Afghan provinces will Afghan officials say were hit in Pakistan's border air raids by February 23, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-04. Border tensions between Pakistan and Afghanistan sometimes lead to competing official claims about where military force was used. If Afghan authorities accuse Pakistan of air raids before the resolution date, this question asks which province names they will publicly

Title: Off the coast of which Greek island will authorities report that a migrant boat capsized by 22 February 2026?
